g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the client connect to the Reso API?')
sendPrompt('How does the FastAPI middleware handle auth, rate limiting and tracing?')
g.text: require_auth (python-jose JWT) · require_rate_limit (Redis INCR/EXPIRE) · OTEL tracing

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the chat route stream tokens back via SSE?')
sendPrompt('How does context hydration load the user profile and memories in parallel?')
sendPrompt('How does classify_route_node merge classification and routing into one LLM call?')
sendPrompt('How does the free_flow node stream tokens directly with the final_response tag?')
sendPrompt('How does LangGraph Send API dispatch domain agents in parallel?')
sendPrompt('How does the nutrition agent log meals and query food data?')
sendPrompt('How does the fitness agent log workouts and track exercise data?')
sendPrompt('How does the medical agent log conditions, medications and body metrics?')
sendPrompt('How does the aggregator synthesize multi-agent results and stream the final response?')
g.text: multi-agent: synthesis LLM · tags=["final_response"] · real token streaming
single-agent / free_flow: pass-through · fallback 30-char chunked stream

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does astream_events v2 stream token and done events back to the client?')
sendPrompt('What does Reso persist to Supabase after each conversation turn?')
g.text: AsyncRedisSaver checkpoint · pod crash recovery per thread_id
